shellCommands.command: pwd && ls -la && find . -maxdepth 2 -type f | sed 's#^./##' | head -80

cat package.json && printf '
--- app/page.tsx ---
' && sed -n '1,240p' app/page.tsx && printf '
--- lib/db.js ---
' && sed -n '1,240p' lib/db.js && printf '
--- layout ---
' && cat app/layout.tsx
cat AGENTS.md && cat tsconfig.json && cat next.config.ts
git diff --stat && git diff --check && git status --short
